sentiment.reasoning: A product recall due to quality concerns creates immediate negative sentiment and operational disruption.

sentiment.reasoning: A 7% increase in customer acquisition indicates positive growth momentum for the company.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
